Package org.eventb.core.extension

Interface IFormulaExtensionProvider

All Known Implementing Classes:
PrimeFormulaExtensionProvider
public interface IFormulaExtensionProvider
Common protocol for providing extensions to the Event-B mathematical language to be used in models and proofs. Implementations of this interface must be registered using the org.eventb.core.formulaExtensionProvider extension point.

This interface is intended to be implemented by clients.

Since:
2.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Set<IRodinFile>
    getFactoryFiles(IEventBRoot root)
    Returns files used for the computation of the factory for the given file root.
    Set<IFormulaExtension>
    getFormulaExtensions(IEventBRoot root)
    Returns a set of formula extensions defined for the given file root.
    String
    getId()
    Returns the id of the current formula extension provider.
    FormulaFactory
    loadFormulaFactory(ILanguage element, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor)
    Returns the formula factory previously stored in the given element.
    void
    saveFormulaFactory(ILanguage element, FormulaFactory factory, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor)
    Serializes the given formula factory into the given element.

  • Method Details

    • getId

      String getId()
      Returns the id of the current formula extension provider.
      Returns:
      the id of this provider

    • getFormulaExtensions

      Set<IFormulaExtension> getFormulaExtensions(IEventBRoot root)
      Returns a set of formula extensions defined for the given file root.
      Parameters:
      root - the root element to retrieve extensions for
      Returns:
      a set of extensions
      Throws:
      RuntimeCoreException - if an error occurred while making the extensions

    • getFactoryFiles

      Set<IRodinFile> getFactoryFiles(IEventBRoot root)
      Returns files used for the computation of the factory for the given file root.

      Subsequently, the builder (SC, POG and POM) will consider that there is a dependency from returned files to the given one.

      Parameters:
      root - an event-b root
      Returns:
      a set of rodin files
      Throws:
      RuntimeCoreException - if an error occurred while making the extensions
      Since:
      3.0

    • loadFormulaFactory

      FormulaFactory loadFormulaFactory(ILanguage element, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Returns the formula factory previously stored in the given element. If no formula factory was stored previously in this element, this is an error and should be reported by throwing a Core exception.
      Parameters:
      element - a Rodin element containing a serialized formula factory
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Returns:
      the contained formula factory
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if a problem occurs while deserializing
      Since:
      3.0

    • saveFormulaFactory

      void saveFormulaFactory(ILanguage element, FormulaFactory factory, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Serializes the given formula factory into the given element. It is guaranteed that this element is empty (no child, nor attribute) when this method is called.
      Parameters:
      element - a Rodin element where to serialize
      factory - a formula factory to serialize
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if a problem occurs while serializing
      Since:
      3.0
